category_sources: source_facts.description: shell history synced, queryable, and in context; official GitHub README describes hiSHtory as better shell history.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title uses hiSHtory; source_facts.homepage is hishtory.dev.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and includes getting started, features, design, and security notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/ddworken/hishtory; per instructions repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies shell history sync/query behavior; official GitHub README describes CLI querying, context storage, SQLite, and encrypted syncing.
